rubric_breakdown.feedback: The student did not label the number line correctly. The numbers to the left of the 0 are positive when they should be negative.
It is unclear if the student used arrows to indicate the direction of movement on the number line.
The final answer is not clearly marked on the number line. There is a box around the number 0, but the evidence on the hand drawn model does not indicate that this would be the final answer.
The student did not label each addend on the number line.
